executives.name: Marc Henderson
executives.background: Mr. Henderson has more than 25 years of experience in the resource sector. He has been the President and CEO of Laramide since 2005. He is also a director of several other public companies.

executives.name: Dennis Gibson
executives.background: Mr. Gibson is a CPA with over 30 years of experience in senior financial positions. He has been the CFO of Laramide since 2006.

executives.name: Bryn Jones
executives.background: Mr. Jones is a chemical engineer with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in the uranium sector. He joined Laramide as COO in 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Marc Henderson
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Laramide Resources Ltd. since 2005.

board_of_directors.name: John Booth
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Booth is a lawyer and investment banker with over 30 years of experience in the resource sector. He is currently the Chairman of Laramide.

board_of_directors.name: Raffi Babikian
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Babikian has over 15 years of experience in the uranium industry, including roles in investment banking and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: Jacqueline Allison
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Allison has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry as a research analyst and investment manager.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Board Profiles
